assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: The response clearly states '24-month support for versions 1.27+ (vs 14 months on Regular)' in the benefits section

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: The response explicitly mentions 'Additional cost during extended support period (months 15-24 of version lifecycle)' and has a dedicated cost impact section

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: The response states 'Same patch timing as Regular — patches arrive at Regular channel speed, no delay' and explains the extended availability during months 15-24

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: The response mentions 'Less frequent feature access — you'll be on older minor versions longer than Regular channel users' as a key tradeoff

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: The response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: The response includes a specific warning about checking if 1.31 is available in Extended channel and provides the command to check: 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone ZONE --format="yaml(channels.EXTENDED.validVersions)"'

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: The response mentions 'regulated environments' and recommends Extended for maximum stability and predictability, which addresses compliance and slow change process needs

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: The response states that automatic upgrades still trigger 'at end of extended support' and discusses the 24-month lifecycle limit

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: The response explicitly states 'Manual control over minor version upgrades — control plane minor versions are NOT auto-upgraded (except at end of extended support)' and emphasizes manual upgrade responsibility throughout
